experiments.title: The 1-hour ship
experiments.why: Pick something tiny, set a public 60-minute timer, ship what exists at the end. Small scope plus a deadline beats a perfect plan.

experiments.title: Morning attention reset
experiments.why: First 30 minutes: no phone, no feed, one page of writing. It anchors the whole day's focus.

experiments.title: One local AI helper
experiments.why: Run a small model offline for one repetitive task. Free, private, and a fast way to feel where AI helps you.
